pixel-10-pro-xl._note: 6.8in, 1344x2992 panel. Viewport 448x997 @3 mapped from the same-resolution Pixel 9 Pro XL (Google reuses the panel); no standalone Pixel 10 Pro XL entry was found in spec databases as of 2026-06.
